heading: Rooms

layout.sub: Manage your rooms and drop into open interview lobbies.

matchmaking.idleDescription: Choose your preferences and enter the queue.
matchmaking.searchingDescription: Looking for a public room that matches your preferences.
matchmaking.matchedDescription: A matching room was found. Redirecting to the workspace.
matchmaking.searchFailed: Couldn't search for a match right now.

browse.heading: Public Rooms
browse.subheading: Drop into an open interview room and practice with someone already online.

emptyState.title: Nothing on air right now
emptyState.subtitle: Public rooms come and go. Create your own, or loosen your filters to see more.

browse.joinSuccess: Joined room. Taking you there now.
browse.joinFailed: Couldn't join this room. It may be full or no longer public.
browse.joinRemoved: You've been removed from this room.

join.heading: Join a Room
join.description: Paste an invite link from your partner to join their workspace.
join.error: Paste a valid invite link (e.g. https://…/rooms/id?code=XXXXXX)

error.loadFailedDescription: Something went wrong. Please try again.

empty.noRoomsDescription: Create a room to start practicing, or join one using an invite link above.

create.heading: Create Workspace
create.sub: Setup your shared real-time coding environment
create.problemPlaceholder: Type to search and select a problem
create.publicRoomDescription: Anyone with the link can join directly
create.maxParticipantsHelp: 2 for one-on-one, up to 8 to allow observers.
create.modePeerDesc: Practice live with another person as interviewer or candidate.
create.modeAiDesc: An AI plays the interviewer. Solo practice, anytime.
create.aiRequiresSavedProblem: AI interviewer rooms require a saved backend problem.
create.createFailed: Failed to create room. Please try again.
create.mockProblemNotice: Using mock problems because the API returned no real problems. Rooms created from these options will skip backend problem binding for local UI testing.

success.shareLink: Share this invite link with collaborators:
success.publicShareHeading: Your room is live on the public board.
success.publicShareBody: People can find and join it from Browse, or use this link for a direct jump.
success.privateShareHeading: Share this invite link with collaborators
success.privateShareBody: Only people with this link and code can join your private room.

lobby.heading: Workspace Lobby
lobby.sub: Wait for participants and assign roles before entering the workspace.
lobby.joinFailed: Failed to join room. Please check invite link or login state.
lobby.roomNotFound: This room doesn't exist or has been deleted.
lobby.roomFull: This room is full — no more participants can join.
lobby.invalidCode: The invite code is invalid or has expired.
lobby.accessDenied: You don't have permission to join this room.
lobby.roleUnavailable: That requested role is already taken in this room.
lobby.fallbackObserver: Requested role was unavailable, so you were added as Observer.
lobby.autoAssigned: Joined as {{role}} based on the current room balance.
lobby.roleConstraintViolation: This role change would break the required role balance.
lobby.participantNotFound: This participant is no longer in the room.
lobby.transitionFailed: Failed to update the room stage.
lobby.invalidTransition: This stage transition isn't allowed from the current state.
lobby.notPeerMode: This action is only available in peer interview mode.
lobby.awaitingController: Waiting for the host or current interviewer to open the workspace.
lobby.previewWorkspaceHelp: Local preview bypasses role validation and seeds mock problem/comment data for UI testing.
lobby.removedFromRoom: You have been removed from this room by the host.
lobby.participantsNotReady: All participants must be ready before starting.

readyButton.readyFirst: Click "I'm Ready" before entering the workspace.

warning: Needs exactly one candidate and one interviewer to start.
warningAi: Needs exactly one candidate to start (no interviewer needed).

hostControl.heading: Host Control
hostControl.viewOnly: Stage ownership belongs to the host or current interviewer.
hostControl.awaitingController: You can watch the stage here, but only the host or current interviewer can move it.
hostControl.awaitingReady: Waiting for all required participants to be ready.

problem.heading: Problem
problem.hintEmpty: No hints yet. Click "Get Hint" to request one.
problem.hintReflectionPlaceholder: Share your current reasoning so AI can guide your next step...
problem.noProblem: No problem selected for this room.

workspace.sub: This is the live interview workspace. Stage controls live here while the editor stays shared.
workspace.editorSub: Edit code here, then run it against the sandboxed runner.
workspace.readOnly: This editor is read-only for your current role or room state.
workspace.stdinPlaceholder: Optional stdin for an interactive run
workspace.permissionDenied: You don't have permission to do this.
workspace.problemNotFound: No problem is selected for this room.
workspace.noProblemTestCases: This problem doesn't have any test cases yet.
workspace.executionUnavailable: The execution service is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
workspace.executionTimeout: The execution service timed out. Try again.
workspace.noOutput: Run the current code to see stdout and stderr here.
workspace.executionQueued: Execution queued. Waiting for the sandbox runner...
workspace.removeParticipantConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from the room?
workspace.transferOwnershipConfirm: Are you sure you want to transfer room ownership to {{name}}? You will lose host privileges.
workspace.cannotTransferOwnership: Cannot transfer ownership to this participant.
workspace.submissionPreviewDescription: Please review your code before final submission.
workspace.noTestcases: Add a test case or select a problem.
workspace.mockPreviewBanner: Mock workspace preview: run and submit are disabled, and sample problem/comment data is seeded locally.
workspace.inlineCommentsPlaceholder: Add an inline note for line {{line}}
workspace.inlineCommentsEmpty: No inline comments yet. Add one for the selected line.
workspace.noStarterForLanguage: No starter code for {{language}} — starting with a blank editor.
workspace.rolesLocked: Roles are locked once the session starts.
workspace.chatEmpty: No messages yet. Start the conversation.
workspace.chatAiHint: Mention @ai to prepare for future AI chat replies.
workspace.hintFollowUpFailed: Failed to generate AI follow-up hint.
workspace.hintRateLimited: Hint rate limit exceeded (3 per 5 minutes).
workspace.hintUnavailable: AI hint service is temporarily unavailable.
workspace.hintPermissionDenied: You do not have permission to request AI hints in this room.
workspace.aiInterviewPlaceholder: Type your response to the interviewer...
workspace.aiInterviewEmpty: The AI interviewer will ask you questions about the problem. Type your response below.
workspace.aiInterviewFailed: Failed to get a response from the AI interviewer.
workspace.aiInterviewUnavailable: AI interviewer service is temporarily unavailable.

whiteboard.popOut: Pop out into a floating window
whiteboard.poppedOut: Whiteboard is in a floating window
